name: Credential API Hooking - DLL Injection into Authentication Processes
description: Detects credential API hooking by monitoring for unsigned DLL loads in lsass.exe, API hooking frameworks (EasyHook, Detours), and tools targeting LsaLogonUser and authentication buffer functions.
query: library where process.name == "lsass.exe" and dll.code_signature.exists == false and not dll.path : ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\*")
note: Alternative KQL for tool detection: process.command_line: (*EasyHook* or *Detours* or *InjectDLL* or *LsaLogonUser* or *SspiLogon*)
